evals.expected_output: Structured review with verdict, risk, per-file findings, graph context, follow-up offering Track as bugs or Done

assertions.text: Output contains a verdict (Passes review or Needs changes)
Output contains a risk level (Low, Medium, or High)
Findings grouped by file path with severity tags
Follow-up offers Track as bugs and Done options
Handles non-code files gracefully (no crash, acknowledges limitations)

evals.expected_output: Review report for branch diff vs main, follow-up offers only Done (no br tracking)

assertions.text: Follow-up offers only Done (no Track as bugs)

evals.expected_output: Deep review of staged changes with graph context and own-code follow-up

assertions.text: Uses git diff --staged for scope detection
Deep review depth for small scope (1-3 files)
Follow-up offers Track as bugs and Done options
